_doc.about: Lane-11 missions lint/status config consumed by lfd/_shared/scorer/lint_core.py and status_core.py. Common caps plus missions state-machine caps. Deleting required keys is a lint violation.

cap_rationale.no_budget_gate_bypass: Budget enforcement is core state-machine behavior; added bypass/TODO markers void.
cap_rationale.no_checkpoint_disable: Durable checkpoints are mandatory; added skip/disable checkpoint paths void.
cap_rationale.no_dev_seed_literals: All distinctive eval seed text carries lfdmission; product/runtime code must not learn fixtures by literal.
cap_rationale.no_eval_case_id_branching: Blocks product/test code special-casing visible dev or holdout mission case ids.
cap_rationale.no_failure_category_literal_table: Blocks hardcoded adaptation keyed on dev failure categories such as webhook_timeout or api_quota_spike.
cap_rationale.no_static_meta_prompt_shortcut: Meta-prompt must flow from memory and mission state, not a static fixture.
cap_rationale.no_test_weakening: Stage-0 tests cannot be ignored or cfg-nevered to improve score.
cap_rationale.no_unbounded_spawn_loop: Recursive or unbounded mission spawning is explicitly a failure case.

_doc.reconciliation: State-machine framing from the lane addendum supersedes the older meta-prompt-only brief; surviving mission-specific cheat fences cover memory-prompt data flow, restart durability, duplicate identity, routine-vs-task decisions, and budget gates.
